name.desc: Used to specify the name of the control; Useful if dealing with forms; If not specified, it takes the value of 'for' prop, if it exists
name.desc_cn: 用于指定控件的名称；在处理表单时非常有用；如果未指定，则使用 'for' 属性的值，如果存在的话。

virtual-scroll-horizontal.desc: Make virtual list work in horizontal mode
virtual-scroll-horizontal.desc_cn: 使虚拟列表在水平模式下工作

virtual-scroll-slice-size.desc: Minimum number of items to render in the virtual list
virtual-scroll-slice-size.desc_cn: 虚拟列表中要渲染的最小项数

virtual-scroll-slice-ratio-before.desc: Ratio of number of items in visible zone to render before it
virtual-scroll-slice-ratio-before.desc_cn: 可见区域内要渲染的项目数量与之前的比例

virtual-scroll-slice-ratio-after.desc: Ratio of number of items in visible zone to render after it
virtual-scroll-slice-ratio-after.desc_cn: 在可见区域后渲染的项目数量与其之间的比率

virtual-scroll-item-size.desc: Default size in pixels (height if vertical, width if horizontal) of an item; This value is used for rendering the initial list; Try to use a value close to the minimum size of an item
virtual-scroll-item-size.desc_cn: 一个项目中默认的尺寸（如果是垂直方向则为高度，如果是水平方向则为宽度）；该值用于渲染初始列表；尽量使用接近最小项大小的值。

virtual-scroll-sticky-size-start.desc: Size in pixels (height if vertical, width if horizontal) of the sticky part (if using one) at the start of the list; A correct value will improve scroll precision
virtual-scroll-sticky-size-start.desc_cn: 列表开始处粘性部分（如果使用）的像素大小（垂直时为高度，水平时为宽度）；正确的值将提高滚动精确度。

virtual-scroll-sticky-size-end.desc: Size in pixels (height if vertical, width if horizontal) of the sticky part (if using one) at the end of the list; A correct value will improve scroll precision
virtual-scroll-sticky-size-end.desc_cn: 列表末尾粘性部分（如果使用）的像素大小（垂直时为高度，水平时为宽度）；正确的值将提高滚动精确度。

table-colspan.desc: The number of columns in the table (you need this if you use table-layout: fixed)
table-colspan.desc_cn: 表格中的列数（如果使用 table-layout: fixed，则需要此属性）

model-value.desc: Model of the component; Must be Array if using 'multiple' prop; Either use this property (along with a listener for 'update:modelValue' event) OR use v-model directive
model-value.desc_cn: 组件的 model 数据；如果使用 'multiple' 属性，则必须是一个数组；可以使用此属性（以及监听 'update:modelValue' 事件的侦听器）或者使用 v-model 指令。

error-message.desc: Validation error message (gets displayed only if 'error' is set to 'true')
examples: Username must have at least 5 characters
error-message.desc_cn: 验证错误消息（仅在 'error' 设置为 'true' 时显示）

no-error-icon.desc: Hide error icon when there is an error
no-error-icon.desc_cn: 当出现错误时隐藏错误图标

rules.desc: Array of Functions/Strings; If String, then it must be a name of one of the embedded validation rules
examples: :rules="[ (val, rules) => rules.email(val) || 'Please enter a valid email address' ]"
rules.desc_cn: 函数/字符串数组；如果是字符串，则必须是内置验证规则之一的名称

reactive-rules.desc: By default a change in the rules does not trigger a new validation until the model changes; If set to true then a change in the rules will trigger a validation; Has a performance penalty, so use it only when you really need it
reactive-rules.desc_cn: 默认情况下，规则的更改不会触发新的验证，直到模型发生变化；如果设置为 true，则规则的更改将触发验证；这会带来性能损失，所以只在真正需要时使用。

lazy-rules.desc: If set to boolean true then it checks validation status against the 'rules' only after field loses focus for first time; If set to 'ondemand' then it will trigger only when component's validate() method is manually called or when the wrapper QForm submits itself
lazy-rules.desc_cn: 如果设置为布尔值 true，则仅在字段第一次失去焦点后才根据 'rules' 检查验证状态；如果设置为 'ondemand'，则只有在手动调用组件的 validate() 方法或者当包装器 QForm 提交自身时才会触发。

label.desc: A text label that will “float” up above the input field, once the field gets focus
label.desc_cn: 输入框获得焦点后，会在输入字段上方“浮动”显示的文本标签

stack-label.desc: Label will be always shown above the field regardless of field content (if any)
stack-label.desc_cn: 无论字段内容如何，标签始终显示在字段上方

hint.desc: Helper (hint) text which gets placed below your wrapped form component
hint.desc_cn: 帮助（提示）文本，放置在包裹的表单组件下方

hide-hint.desc: Hide the helper (hint) text when field doesn't have focus
hide-hint.desc_cn: 当字段没有焦点时隐藏辅助（提示）文本

label-color.desc: Color name for the label from the Quasar Color Palette; Overrides the 'color' prop; The difference from 'color' prop is that the label will always have this color, even when field is not focused
label-color.desc_cn: 从 Quasar 颜色调色板中选择的标签颜色名称；覆盖 'color' 属性；与 'color' 属性的区别在于，即使字段没有聚焦，标签也始终具有此颜色。

color.desc: Color name for component from the Quasar Color Palette
color.desc_cn: 来自 Quasar 颜色调色板的组件颜色名称

bg-color.desc: Color name for component from the Quasar Color Palette
bg-color.desc_cn: 来自 Quasar 颜色调色板的组件颜色名称

dark.desc: Notify the component that the background is a dark color
dark.desc_cn: 通知组件背景颜色为深色

loading.desc: Signals the user a process is in progress by displaying a spinner; Spinner can be customized by using the 'loading' slot.
loading.desc_cn: 通过显示一个旋转器来向用户表示进程正在进行中；可以使用 'loading' 插槽自定义旋转器。

clearable.desc: Appends clearable icon when a value (not undefined or null) is set; When clicked, model becomes null
clearable.desc_cn: 当设置了值（不是 undefined 或 null）时，添加可清除的图标；点击后，model 变为 null

clear-icon.desc: Custom icon to use for the clear button when using along with 'clearable' prop
clear-icon.desc_cn: 当与 'clearable' 属性一起使用时，自定义用于清除按钮的图标

borderless.desc_cn: 为该字段使用 '无边框' 设计

standout.desc: Use 'standout' design for the field; Specifies classes to be applied when focused (overriding default ones)
standout.desc_cn: 为字段使用 'standout'（突出显示）设计；指定在聚焦时应用的类（覆盖默认类）

label-slot.desc: Enables label slot; You need to set it to force use of the 'label' slot if the 'label' prop is not set
label-slot.desc_cn: 启用标签插槽；如果未设置 'label' 属性，则需要将其设置为强制使用 'label' 插槽。

hide-bottom-space.desc: Do not reserve space for hint/error/counter anymore when these are not used; As a result, it also disables the animation for those; It also allows the hint/error area to stretch vertically based on its content
hide-bottom-space.desc_cn: 当未使用提示/错误/计数器时，请不再保留空间；因此，这也会禁用这些部分的动画效果；它还允许提示/错误区域根据其内容在垂直方向上拉伸。

counter.desc: Show an automatic counter on bottom right
counter.desc_cn: 在右下角显示一个自动计数器

rounded.desc: Applies a small standard border-radius for a squared shape of the component
rounded.desc_cn: 为组件的方形形状应用了一个小的标准边框半径

square.desc: Remove border-radius so borders are squared; Overrides 'rounded' prop
square.desc_cn: 移除边框半径以使边框变为方形；覆盖 'rounded' 属性

dense.desc_cn: 紧凑模式；占用较少空间

item-aligned.desc: Match inner content alignment to that of QItem
item-aligned.desc_cn: 将内部内容的对齐方式与 QItem 的对齐方式匹配

disable.desc_cn: 将组件置于禁用模式中

readonly.desc_cn: 将组件置于只读模式中

autofocus.desc: Focus field on initial component render
autofocus.desc_cn: 在初始组件渲染时聚焦字段

for.desc: Used to specify the 'id' of the control and also the 'for' attribute of the label that wraps it; If no 'name' prop is specified, then it is used for this attribute as well
for.desc_cn: 用于指定控件的 'id'，同时也是包裹它的标签的 'for' 属性；如果未指定 'name' 属性，则同样用于此属性。

multiple.desc: Allow multiple selection; Model must be Array
multiple.desc_cn: 允许多选；model 必须是一个数组

display-value.desc: Override default selection string, if not using 'selected' slot/scoped slot and if not using 'use-chips' prop
display-value.desc_cn: 如果没有使用 'selected' 插槽/作用域插槽和 'use-chips' 属性，则覆盖默认的选择字符串

display-value-html.desc: Force render the selected option(s) as HTML; This can lead to XSS attacks so make sure that you sanitize the content; Does NOT apply when using 'selected' or 'selected-item' slots!
display-value-html.desc_cn: 强制将选定的选项渲染为 HTML；这可能导致 XSS 攻击，所以请确保对内容进行清理；当使用 'selected' 或 'selected-item' 插槽时不适用！

options.desc: Available options that the user can select from. For best performance freeze the list of options.
options.desc_cn: 用户可以选择的可用选项。为了获得最佳性能，请冻结选项列表。

option-value.desc: Property of option which holds the 'value'; If using a function then for best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline
option-value.desc_cn: 选项的属性，用于保存 'value'。如果使用函数，则为了获得最佳性能，请从作用域中引用它，而不要内联定义它。

option-label.desc: Property of option which holds the 'label'; If using a function then for best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline
option-label.desc_cn: 选项的属性，用于保存 'label'。如果使用函数，则为了获得最佳性能，请从作用域中引用它，而不要内联定义它。

option-disable.desc: Property of option which tells it's disabled; The value of the property must be a Boolean; If using a function then for best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

returns.desc: If true, the current option will be disabled
returns.desc_cn: 如果为 true，则当前选项将被禁用

option-disable.desc_cn: 禁用选项的属性；该属性的值必须是布尔类型；如果使用函数，则为了获得最佳性能，请从作用域中引用它，而不要内联定义。

hide-selected.desc: Hides selection; Use the underlying input tag to hold the label (instead of showing it to the right of the input) of the selected option; Only works for non 'multiple' Selects
hide-selected.desc_cn: 隐藏选择项；使用底层的 input 标签来保存选中选项的标签（而不是在输入框右侧显示）；仅适用于非 'multiple' 的 Select 组件。

dropdown-icon.desc: Icon name following Quasar convention; Make sure you have the icon library installed unless you are using 'img:' prefix; If 'none' (String) is used as value then no icon is rendered (but screen real estate will still be used for it)
dropdown-icon.desc_cn: 遵循 Quasar 框架约定的图标名称；确保您已安装图标库，除非使用 'img:' 前缀；如果值为 'none'（字符串），则不会渲染任何图标（但屏幕空间仍将被占用）

max-values.desc: Allow a maximum number of selections that the user can do
max-values.desc_cn: 允许用户可以进行的最大选择数量

options-dense.desc: Dense mode for options list; occupies less space
options-dense.desc_cn: 选项列表的紧凑模式；占用较少空间

options-dark.desc: Options menu will be colored with a dark color
options-dark.desc_cn: 选项菜单将使用深色进行着色

options-selected-class.desc: CSS class name for options that are active/selected; Set it to an empty string to stop applying the default (which is text-* where * is the 'color' prop value)
options-selected-class.desc_cn: 选中的选项的 CSS 类名；将其设置为空字符串以停止应用默认值（默认为 text-*，其中 * 是 'color' 属性的值）

options-html.desc: Force render the options as HTML; This can lead to XSS attacks so make sure that you sanitize the content; Does NOT apply when using 'option' slot!
options-html.desc_cn: 强制将选项渲染为 HTML；这可能导致 XSS 攻击，所以请确保对内容进行清理；在使用 'option' 插槽时不适用！

options-cover.desc: Expanded menu will cover the component (will not work along with 'use-input' prop for obvious reasons)
options-cover.desc_cn: 展开的菜单将覆盖组件（由于明显的原因，与'use-input'属性一起使用无效）

menu-shrink.desc: Allow the options list to be narrower than the field (only in menu mode)
menu-shrink.desc_cn: 允许选项列表比字段更窄（仅在菜单模式下）

menu-anchor.desc: Two values setting the starting position or anchor point of the options list relative to the field (only in menu mode)
menu-anchor.desc_cn: 两个值设置选项列表相对于字段的起始位置或锚点（仅在菜单模式下）

menu-self.desc: Two values setting the options list's own position relative to its target (only in menu mode)
menu-self.desc_cn: 两个值设置选项列表相对于其目标的位置（仅在菜单模式下）

menu-offset.desc: An array of two numbers to offset the options list horizontally and vertically in pixels (only in menu mode)
menu-offset.desc_cn: 一个包含两个数字的数组，用于以像素为单位水平和垂直偏移选项列表（仅在菜单模式下）

popup-content-class.desc: Class definitions to be attributed to the popup content
popup-content-class.desc_cn: 要分配给弹出内容的类定义

popup-content-style.desc: Style definitions to be attributed to the popup content
popup-content-style.desc_cn: 要应用于弹出内容的样式定义

popup-no-route-dismiss.desc: Changing route app won't dismiss the popup (menu or dialog)
popup-no-route-dismiss.desc_cn: 更改路由应用程序不会关闭弹出窗口（菜单或对话框）

use-input.desc: Use an input tag where users can type
use-input.desc_cn: 使用一个输入标签，用户可以在其中输入

use-chips.desc: Use QChip to show what is currently selected
use-chips.desc_cn: 使用 QChip 来显示当前选择的内容

fill-input.desc: Fills the input with current value; Useful along with 'hide-selected'; Does NOT works along with 'multiple' selection
fill-input.desc_cn: 用当前值填充输入框；与 'hide-selected' 一起使用效果更佳；不适用于 'multiple' 多选。

new-value-mode.desc: Enables creation of new values and defines behavior when a new value is added: 'add' means it adds the value (even if possible duplicate), 'add-unique' adds only unique values, and 'toggle' adds or removes the value (based on if it exists or not already); When using this prop then listening for @new-value becomes optional (only to override the behavior defined by 'new-value-mode')
new-value-mode.desc_cn: 启用创建新值并定义添加新值时的行为：'add' 表示添加该值（即使可能重复），'add-unique' 仅添加唯一值，而 'toggle' 则根据该值是否已存在来添加或删除该值；当使用此属性时，监听 @new-value 变得可选（只是为了覆盖由 'new-value-mode' 定义的行为）。

map-options.desc: Try to map labels of model from 'options' Array; has a small performance penalty; If you are using emit-value you will probably need to use map-options to display the label text in the select field rather than the value;  Refer to the 'Affecting model' section above
map-options.desc_cn: 尝试将模型的标签从 'options' 数组中映射；会有一定的性能损耗；如果您使用了 emit-value，则可能需要使用 map-options 来在选择字段中显示标签文本而不是值；请参考上面的 '影响模型' 部分。

emit-value.desc: Update model with the value of the selected option instead of the whole option
emit-value.desc_cn: 使用选中选项的值来更新模型，而不是整个选项

input-debounce.desc: Debounce the input model update with an amount of milliseconds (also affects the 'filter' event, if used)
input-debounce.desc_cn: 使用指定的毫秒数对输入模型更新进行防抖处理（也会影响到 'filter' 事件）

input-class.desc: Class definitions to be attributed to the underlying input tag
input-class.desc_cn: 用于给底层输入标签添加的类定义

input-style.desc: Style definitions to be attributed to the underlying input tag
input-style.desc_cn: 要应用于底层输入标签的样式定义

transition-show.desc: Transition when showing the menu/dialog; One of Quasar's embedded transitions
transition-show.desc_cn: 显示菜单/对话框时的过渡效果；Quasar 内置的过渡效果之一

transition-hide.desc: Transition when hiding the menu/dialog; One of Quasar's embedded transitions
transition-hide.desc_cn: 隐藏菜单/对话框时的过渡效果；Quasar 内置的过渡效果之一

transition-duration.desc: Transition duration when hiding the menu/dialog (in milliseconds, without unit)
transition-duration.desc_cn: 隐藏菜单/对话框时的过渡持续时间（以毫秒为单位，无单位）

behavior.desc: Overrides the default dynamic mode of showing as menu on desktop and dialog on mobiles
behavior.desc_cn: 在桌面上覆盖默认的动态模式，以菜单形式显示，在移动设备上以对话框形式显示

prepend.desc: Prepend inner field; Suggestions: QIcon, QBtn
prepend.desc_cn: 在内部字段之前添加；建议使用：QIcon、QBtn

append.desc: Append to inner field; Suggestions: QIcon, QBtn
append.desc_cn: 追加到内部字段；建议使用：QIcon、QBtn

before.desc: Prepend outer field; Suggestions: QIcon, QBtn
before.desc_cn: 在外部字段之前添加；建议使用：QIcon、QBtn

after.desc: Append outer field; Suggestions: QIcon, QBtn
after.desc_cn: 追加外部字段；建议使用：QIcon、QBtn

label.desc: Slot for label; Used only if 'label-slot' prop is set or the 'label' prop is set; When it is used the text in the 'label' prop is ignored
label.desc_cn: 标签的插槽；仅在设置了 'label-slot' 属性或者设置了 'label' 属性时使用；当使用插槽时，忽略 'label' 属性中的文本

error.desc: Slot for errors; Enabled only if 'bottom-slots' prop is used; Suggestion: <div>
error.desc_cn: 错误插槽；仅在使用 'bottom-slots' 属性时启用；建议使用：<div>

hint.desc: Slot for hint text; Enabled only if 'bottom-slots' prop is used; Suggestion: <div>
hint.desc_cn: 提示文本的插槽；仅在使用 'bottom-slots' 属性时启用；建议使用：<div>

counter.desc: Slot for counter text; Enabled only if 'bottom-slots' prop is used; Suggestion: <div>
counter.desc_cn: 计数器文本的插槽；仅在使用 'bottom-slots' 属性时启用；建议使用：<div>

loading.desc: Override default spinner when component is in loading mode; Suggestion: spinners
loading.desc_cn: 在组件处于加载模式时覆盖默认的旋转器；建议使用：spinners

selected.desc: Override default selection slot; Suggestion: QChip
selected.desc_cn: 覆盖默认的选择插槽；建议使用 QChip。

before-options.desc: Template slot for the elements that should be rendered before the list of options
before-options.desc_cn: 在选项列表之前应该渲染的元素的模板插槽

after-options.desc: Template slot for the elements that should be rendered after the list of options
after-options.desc_cn: 应该渲染在选项列表之后的元素的模板插槽

no-option.desc: What should the menu display after filtering options and none are left to be displayed; Suggestion: <div>

inputValue.desc: Input textfield value, if any (not QSelect model)
inputValue.desc_cn: 输入文本字段的值，如果有的话（不是 QSelect 的 model 数据）

no-option.desc_cn: 过滤选项后，如果没有剩余的选项可供显示，菜单应该显示什么；建议使用 <div>。

selected-item.desc: Override default selection slot; Suggestion: QChip

opt.desc: Selected option -- its value is taken from model
opt.desc_cn: 选中的选项 -- 其值取自 model 数据

selected.desc: Always true -- passed down as prop to QItem (when using QItem)
selected.desc_cn: 始终为 true -- 作为 prop 传递给 QItem（当使用 QItem 组件时）

removeAtIndex.desc: Remove selected option located at specific index

index.desc: Index at which to remove selection
index.desc_cn: 要删除选择的索引位置

removeAtIndex.desc_cn: 移除位于特定索引位置的选中选项

toggleOption.desc_cn: 从 model 中添加/移除选项

tabindex.desc: Tabindex HTML attribute value associated with respective option
tabindex.desc_cn: 与相应选项关联的 tabindex HTML 属性值

selected-item.desc_cn: 覆盖默认的选择插槽；建议使用 QChip。

option.desc: Customize how options are rendered; Suggestion: QItem

opt.desc: Option -- its value is taken from 'options' prop
opt.desc_cn: 选项 -- 其值取自 'options' 属性

focused.desc_cn: 选项是否处于焦点状态？

toggleOption.desc_cn: 从 model 中添加/删除选项

itemProps.desc: Computed properties passed down to QItem
itemProps.desc_cn: 传递给 QItem 的计算属性

option.desc_cn: 自定义选项的渲染方式；建议使用：QItem

virtual-scroll.desc: Emitted when the virtual scroll occurs

details.desc: Object of properties on the new scroll position

index.desc: Index of the list item that was scrolled into view (0 based)
index.desc_cn: 滚动到视图中的列表项的索引（从0开始）

from.desc: The index of the first list item that is rendered (0 based)
from.desc_cn: 渲染的第一个列表项的索引（从0开始）

to.desc: The index of the last list item that is rendered (0 based)
to.desc_cn: 渲染的最后一个列表项的索引（从0开始）

ref.desc_cn: Vue 中对 QSelect 的引用

details.desc_cn: 新滚动位置上的属性对象

virtual-scroll.desc_cn: 虚拟滚动发生时触发的事件

clear.desc: When using the 'clearable' property, this event is emitted when the clear icon is clicked

value.desc: The previous value before clearing it

clear.desc_cn: 当使用 'clearable' 属性时，点击清除图标会触发此事件。

update:model-value.desc: Emitted when the component needs to change the model; Is also used by v-model
update:model-value.desc_cn: 当组件需要更改模型时触发；也被 v-model 使用

input-value.desc: Emitted when the value in the text input changes
input-value.desc_cn: 当文本输入框的值发生变化时触发

remove.desc: Emitted when an option is removed from selection

index.desc: Model index at which removal took place
index.desc_cn: 移除发生的模型索引位置

value.desc: The actual value that was removed

remove.desc_cn: 当选项从选择中移除时触发

add.desc: Emitted when an option is added to the selection

index.desc: Model index at which addition took place

value.desc: The actual value that was added

add.desc_cn: 当选项被添加到选择中时触发

new-value.desc: Enables creation of new values; Emitted when a new value has been created; You can override 'new-value-mode' property with it

doneFn.desc: Adds (optional) value to the model; Do not forget to call it after you validate the newly created value; Call it with no parameters if nothing should be added

mode.desc: Override 'new-value-mode' (prop) behavior should you wish to
mode.desc_cn: 如果您希望覆盖 'new-value-mode'（属性）的行为

doneFn.desc_cn: 向模型中添加（可选）值；在验证新创建的值后不要忘记调用它；如果不需要添加任何内容，请无参数调用它

new-value.desc_cn: 启用新值的创建；当创建了一个新值时触发；您可以使用它来覆盖 'new-value-mode' 属性。

filter.desc: Emitted when user wants to filter a value

doneFn.desc: Supply a function which makes the necessary updates

callbackFn.desc: Callback to call to make the actual updates

afterFn.desc: Callback to call at the end after the update has been fully processed by QSelect

ref.desc: Vue reference to the QSelect which triggered the filtering
ref.desc_cn: Vue 中对触发过滤的 QSelect 的引用

afterFn.desc_cn: 在 QSelect 完全处理更新后调用的回调函数

doneFn.desc_cn: 提供一个函数，该函数执行必要的更新操作。

abortFn.desc: Call this function if something went wrong
abortFn.desc_cn: 如果出现问题，请调用此函数。

filter.desc_cn: 当用户想要过滤值时触发

filter-abort.desc: Emitted when a filtering was aborted; Probably a new one was requested?
filter-abort.desc_cn: 当过滤被中止时触发；可能是请求了一个新的过滤器？

popup-show.desc: Emitted when the select options menu or dialog is shown.
popup-show.desc_cn: 当选择选项菜单或对话框显示时触发。

popup-hide.desc: Emitted when the select options menu or dialog is hidden.
popup-hide.desc_cn: 当选择选项菜单或对话框隐藏时触发。

scrollTo.desc: Scroll the virtual scroll list to the item with the specified index (0 based)

index.desc: The index of the list item (0 based)

edge.desc: The edge to align to if the item is not visible already (by default it aligns to end if scrolling towards the end and to start otherwise); If the '-force' version is used then it always aligns
edge.desc_cn: 如果项目尚未可见，则对齐的边缘（默认情况下，如果向末尾滚动，则对齐到末尾，否则对齐到开头）；如果使用了“-force”版本，则始终进行对齐。

scrollTo.desc_cn: 将虚拟滚动列表滚动到指定索引（从0开始）的项目

reset.desc: Resets the virtual scroll computations; Needed for custom edge-cases
reset.desc_cn: 重置虚拟滚动计算；适用于自定义边缘情况

refresh.desc: Refreshes the virtual scroll list; Use it after appending items

index.desc: The index of the list item to scroll to after refresh (0 based); If it's not specified the scroll position is not changed; Use a negative value to keep scroll position
index.desc_cn: 刷新后要滚动到的列表项的索引（从0开始）；如果未指定，则不更改滚动位置；使用负值保持滚动位置。

refresh.desc_cn: 刷新虚拟滚动列表；在追加项目后使用它

returns.desc: True/false if no async rules, otherwise a Promise with the outcome (true -> validation was a success, false -> invalid models detected)
returns.desc_cn: 如果没有异步规则，则为 true/false，否则为一个带有结果的 Promise（true -> 验证成功，false -> 检测到无效模型）

removeAtIndex.desc: Remove selected option located at specific index

index.desc: Index at which to remove selection
index.desc_cn: 要删除选择的索引位置

removeAtIndex.desc_cn: 移除位于特定索引位置的选中选项

keepOpen.desc: Don't close the menu and do not clear the filter
keepOpen.desc_cn: 不要关闭菜单，也不要清除过滤器

toggleOption.desc_cn: 从 model 中添加/移除选项

getOptionIndex.desc: Gets current focused option index from menu; It's -1 if no option is focused

returns.desc: Index of option from menu; It's -1 if no option is focused
returns.desc_cn: 菜单选项的索引；如果没有选中任何选项，则为-1

getOptionIndex.desc_cn: 从菜单中获取当前聚焦的选项索引；如果没有选项被聚焦，则为 -1

setOptionIndex.desc: Sets option from menu as 'focused'; -1 to focus none

index.desc: Index of option from menu; -1 to focus none
index.desc_cn: 菜单选项的索引；-1 表示不聚焦任何选项

setOptionIndex.desc_cn: 将菜单选项设置为“focused”；-1 表示不聚焦任何选项

moveOptionSelection.desc: Move selected option from menu by index offset

offset.desc: Number of options to move up or down
offset.desc_cn: 向上或向下移动的选项数量

skipInputValue.desc_cn: 不要在导航中设置 input-value

moveOptionSelection.desc_cn: 通过索引偏移将选定的选项从菜单中移动

updateInputValue.desc: If 'use-input' is specified, this updates the value that it holds

value.desc: String to set the input value to

noFilter.desc: Set to true if you don't want the filter (if any) to be also triggered
noFilter.desc_cn: 如果您不希望触发过滤器（如果有的话），请将其设置为 true

updateInputValue.desc_cn: 如果指定了'use-input'，则更新其所持有的值

isOptionSelected.desc: Tells if an option is selected

getEmittingOptionValue.desc: Get the model value that would be emitted by QSelect when selecting a said option; Also takes into consideration if 'emit-value' is set

returns.desc: Emitting model value of said option
returns.desc_cn: 发出所述选项的模型值

getEmittingOptionValue.desc_cn: 获取在选择某个选项时 QSelect 组件将要发出的 model 值；还会考虑是否设置了 'emit-value' 属性。

getOptionValue.desc: Get the model value of an option; Takes into consideration 'option-value' (if used), but does not looks for 'emit-value', like getEmittingOptionValue() does
getOptionValue.desc_cn: 获取选项的模型值；考虑了 'option-value'（如果使用），但不会查找 'emit-value'，就像 getEmittingOptionValue() 函数那样。

getOptionLabel.desc: Get the label of an option; Takes into consideration the 'option-label' prop (if used)
getOptionLabel.desc_cn: 获取选项的标签；考虑到 'option-label' 属性（如果使用）

isOptionDisabled.desc: Tells if an option is disabled; Takes into consideration 'option-disable' prop (if used)

returns.desc_cn: 选项是否禁用或未启用

isOptionDisabled.desc_cn: 判断选项是否被禁用；考虑 'option-disable' 属性（如果已使用）

hasError.desc: Whether the component is in error state
hasError.desc_cn: 组件是否处于错误状态
